questions.question: Describe the main differences between Relational and Object-Oriented data models. Provide one example of each.
questions.hint: Focus on key features and characteristics of each data model

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the Entity-Relationship model in database design?
questions.hint: Focus on the theoretical underpinnings of the model

questions.question: Explain the concept of normalization in database design. Provide an example of a non-normalized database table and how it can be normalized.
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits and drawbacks of normalization
